ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cocoa powder, no added sugars, powder, instant

ingredients_text: Milk chocolate 60% [sugar, cocoa butter, whole milk powder, cocoa mass, anhydrous milk fat, emulsifiers (soya lecithin, polyglycerol polyricinoleate), natural vanilla flavouring], brown rice 24%, white rice 16%. Cocoa solids minimum 32%. May contain traces of sesame.
